title: ETL & Data Ingestion
description: The ETL and Data Ingestion capabilities support the full pipeline for transforming source healthcare data into the OMOP Common Data Model. Features include schema mapping, concept mapping, source profiling, FHIR ingestion, and job monitoring to ensure reliable, auditable data transformation.
tips: Complete schema mapping before concept mapping to establish the structural transformation rules for each source table.
Use the Source Profiler to characterize raw data distributions and identify data quality issues early in the ETL design process.
Iteratively validate ETL outputs against expected OMOP record counts and concept coverage before promoting to production.
Maintain version-controlled ETL specifications to support auditability and reprocessing when vocabulary updates occur.
Monitor Jobs Monitoring dashboards during large data loads to detect and respond to failures promptly.
